name: triploid_paralogs_95_97_99
description: Three overlapping paralog copies of a 50 kb cassette at pairwise identities 95% / 97% / 99% (analogous to a recently expanded gene family with one ancient and two recent copies). Stresses 3-way paralog disambiguation and copy-assignment under graded divergence.
sources: synthetic, designed as mapper stress test — no biological source
